mapper.sql: department_id, department_code, department_name, department_name_en, organization_id, parent_department_id, level, path, manager_id, status, display_order, description, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM departments WHERE organization_id = #{organizationId} ORDER BY display_order
SELECT FROM departments WHERE parent_department_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY display_order
SELECT FROM departments WHERE organization_id = #{organizationId} AND parent_department_id IS NULL ORDER BY display_order
SELECT FROM departments WHERE manager_id = #{managerId} ORDER BY department_code
SELECT FROM departments WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY display_order
mapper.update: UPDATE departments SET department_code = #{code}, department_name = #{name}, department_name_en = #{nameEn}, organization_id = #{organizationId}, parent_department_id = #{parentId}, level = #{level}, path = #{path}, manager_id = #{managerId}, status = #{status}, display_order = #{sortOrder}, description = #{description}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE department_id = #{id}
mapper.delete: UPDATE departments SET status = 'INACTIVE', updated_at = NOW() WHERE department_id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM departments WHERE department_code = #{code})
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM departments WHERE department_id = #{id})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM departments WHERE parent_department_id = #{parentId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM departments WHERE organization_id = #{organizationId}
